zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fitch於大約1465年出生在英國艾可維丁頓時，他的父親John Fitch31歲，母親Juliana Marston32歲。他於1490年12月22日之前與Agnes Alger在英國艾可林瑟爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1514年4月21日在英國艾可林瑟爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國艾可林瑟爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fitch于大约1465年出生在英国艾可維丁頓时，他的父亲John Fitch31岁，母亲Juliana Marston32岁。他于1490年12月22日之前与Agnes Alger在英国艾可林瑟爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1514年4月21日在英国艾可林瑟爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国艾可林瑟爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fitch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Old French fiche, perhaps ‘pointed implement for fixing or transfixing something or someone’ (such as a lance?), a derivative of Old French fichier ‘to fix, fasten, pin on, stick into, pierce’. Compare Modern French fiche ‘peg, pin’. Reaney remarks that ‘as Hugh Malet is said to have abandoned for a time his nickname ‘little hammer’ in favor of Fichet (see Mallet ), fiche must have been used of a pointed weapon, a spear or lance, and Fitch and Fitchett (see Fitchett ) of a spearman or a knight famous for his exploits with the lance’. Use of Fiche as a personal name is possibly implied by diminutive personal name forms such as Fechet (see Fitchett ) and Fechel, attested in Fechel de Fercalahn, 1225–50. The latter is perhaps the source of the now extinct English surname Fetchell.

variants.name: Fitchett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French Fichet, Fichot, or (in northern France) Fiket, Fikot, diminutive forms of fiche or fike ‘pointed implement for fixing or transfixing something or someone’ (such as a spear?), used as a nickname and as a personal name. See Fitch .

variants.name: Mallet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean-Yves, Adelard, Alain, Henri, Jacques, Leonce, Lucien, Monique, Philippe.

French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’. Alternatively, from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (from Latin maledictus, the opposite of benedictus ‘blessed’), applied as a nickname for an unlucky person. Compare Malet 1.
French: variant of   Malet   2, an Old French pet form of the personal name   Malo  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fitch was born about 1465, in Widdington, Essex, England, his father, John Fitch, was 31 and his mother, Juliana Marston, was 32. He married Agnes Alger before 22 December 1490, in Lindsell, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 21 April 1514, in Lindsell, Essex, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Lindsell, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fitch est né environ 1465, à Widdington, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Fitch, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Juliana Marston, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Alger avant 22 décembre 1490, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 21 avril 1514, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Fitch um 1465 in Widdington, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fitch 31 und seine Mutter Juliana Marston 32. Er hat vor 22. Dezember 1490 in Lindsell, Essex, England Agnes Alger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 21. April 1514 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Lindsell, Essex, England und wurde in Lindsell, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fitch è nato il circa 1465 nel Widdington, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Fitch, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Juliana Marston, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Alger prima del 22 dicembre 1490, nel Lindsell, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 21 aprile 1514, nel Lindsell, Essex, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Lindsell, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fitchが約1465年にイギリスエセックスウィッドイントンで生まれた時，父John Fitchは31歳，母Juliana Marstonは32歳であった。1490年12月22日以前にイギリスエセックスリンドセルでAgnes Algerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1514年4月21日にイギリスエセックスリンドセルで50歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスリンドセルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fitch(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 에세스 위딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fitch(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Marston(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1490년 12월 22일 이전 영국 에세스 린드셀에서 Agnes Alger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1514년 4월 21일 영국 에세스 린드셀에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 린드셀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fitch nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Widdington, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fitch, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Marston, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Alger antes 22 de dezembro de 1490, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de abril de 1514, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fitch родился около 1465 г. в местности виддингтон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fitch было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana Marston, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Alger перед 22 декабрь 1490 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 21 апреля 1514 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Fitch nació aproximadamente 1465, en Widdington, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fitch, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Juliana Marston, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes Alger antes de 22 de diciembre de 1490, en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 21 de abril de 1514, en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra.
